title: Ozone Hole vs Climate Change
script_summary: Exploring the distinct challenges of ozone depletion and climate change.

segments.voiceover: Ozone depletion and global warming—two crises, but not the same.
Ozone depletion refers to the thinning of the ozone layer, crucial for blocking harmful UV rays.
But climate change? That’s about rising temperatures and greenhouse gases.
While ozone depletion is mainly caused by human-made chemicals, climate change stems from fossil fuels and deforestation.
The Montreal Protocol successfully reduced ozone-depleting substances, showing we can act.
Understanding these issues lets us tackle them effectively, protecting our planet.
